report.summary: Day 70 standup #9: Full rotation since v7 (5 agents). Build-v7 added DCA Strategy + TradFi-DeFi Convergence guides, publish-v5 promoted Firedancer + OP_CAT (queue now 2: DCA + TradFi-DeFi). Design-v6 polished both new guides (OG images + mobile tables + a11y). Community-v6 drafted DCA/TradFi campaign + 3 SVG cards. EOD-v7 confirmed 658 files, git locks 8 days. 39 agent runs today ($3,313). Priority: clear git locks → deploy → halt builds.

sections.title: Analytics
items: DELTA SINCE STANDUP v7: Full rotation completed — build-v7, publish-v5, community-v6, design-v6, eod-v7 all ran. Zero commits, zero deploys.

BUILD-V7 OUTPUT: 2 new learn guides — Crypto DCA Strategy Guide 2026 (~3,200 words, backtested data, 7 internal links including /tools/dca-calculator) and TradFi-DeFi Convergence Guide 2026 (~3,400 words, institutional adoption, 11 internal links). Both added to PUBLISH_QUEUE.
PUBLISH-V5 OUTPUT: Promoted Solana Firedancer + Bitcoin Covenants/OP_CAT from queue. Queue now has 2 new guides (DCA + TradFi-DeFi). Total published slugs: 436 (+2 from v7).

DESIGN-V6 OUTPUT: 2 new OG images (DCA strategy SVG + TradFi-DeFi convergence SVG). Mobile table scroll wrappers, ToC hover underlines, focus-visible states, aria-labels on both new pages. 5 pages from prior cycles still missing OG images.

COMMUNITY-V6 OUTPUT: 5 tweets + 4-part fear-based DCA thread, 3 SVG social cards (DCA strategy, TradFi-DeFi, fear DCA thread), Discord/TG announcement, newsletter section v2 for Mar 27. Content calendar v3 Mar 23-29.
EOD-V7 FINDING: 658 uncommitted files (47 modified + 611 untracked). 42 TS errors unchanged. Rate limiter 0/6 core routes (40+ cycles). Git locks 8 days old.
PUBLISHED SLUGS: 436 declared in PUBLISHED_PAGES. ~315 in production (last deploy Mar 17, e999560). Gap: ~121 pages invisible to Google.
PUBLISH_QUEUE: 2 pages — /learn/crypto-dca-strategy-guide-2026, /learn/tradfi-defi-convergence-guide-2026.
SEO RISK: 8 days without deploy. Production serves stale content. 121+ built pages not live. Every cycle widens the gap.
MARKET CONTEXT: BTC ~$68K, ETH ~$2,057, SOL ~$88.55. Fear & Greed at 10 (Extreme Fear). Whale accumulation +8,400 BTC. Morgan Stanley MSBT S-1 filed.

sections.title: Project Manager
items: DONE SINCE STANDUP v7: Build-v7 (DCA + TradFi-DeFi guides), publish-v5 (Firedancer + OP_CAT promoted), community-v6 (DCA/TradFi campaign + 3 SVG cards), design-v6 (2 OG images + UX polish + a11y), eod-v7 (QA cycle). 5 agents, ~$452 human-equivalent.

TODAY'S CUMULATIVE OUTPUT: 14+ learn guides built, 11 pages promoted to PUBLISHED_PAGES, 8+ OG images, 20+ social posts + 10 SVG cards, 7 QA cycles, 6 design audits, 39 agent runs across ~6.5 rotations. ZERO deployed to production.
BLOCKER [P0 — 8 DAYS]: Git locks (.git/HEAD.lock + .git/index.lock) since Mar 16. Blocks ALL commits and deploys. Fix: rm .git/index.lock .git/HEAD.lock — requires Jefe's manual intervention.
CARRY-OVER [P1 — 40+ CYCLES]: Rate limiter not wired to 6 core API routes.
CARRY-OVER [P1 — 40+ CYCLES]: /api/defi-yields missing fallback data.
CARRY-OVER [P1]: 42 TS errors in structured-data.examples.ts masked by ignoreBuildErrors.
CARRY-OVER [P2]: 103 orphan slugs, 5 pages missing OG images, SVG→PNG conversion pending.
WARNING: Vercel account status unknown — may need renewal before deploy pipeline works.

sections.title: CEO — Next Cycle Priorities
items: PRIORITY 1 — CLEAR GIT LOCKS AND DEPLOY: 8 days blocked. 658 uncommitted files at risk. rm .git/index.lock .git/HEAD.lock → git add → commit → push → verify Vercel auto-deploy. This is the ONLY priority that matters.
PRIORITY 2 — VERIFY VERCEL ACCOUNT STATUS: Prior cycles flagged expiration warning. If expired, deploy pipeline is broken even after git locks clear.

PRIORITY 3 — HALT ALL BUILD CYCLES: 436 slugs declared, ~315 in production. Content pipeline has outrun shipping by 121 pages. Queue has 2 new guides. Marginal value of building more = $0 until deploy works.

STRATEGIC NOTE: 39 agent runs today ($3,313 human-equivalent) with zero reaching production. Every cycle adds local debt without shipping value. Recommend: standup-only mode until git locks resolved. All other agents are burning cost with no user-facing output.
